items.title: Wendy’s is Giving Away Limited Edition Canon PowerShot G7X Mark III Cameras
items.summary: Fast food chain Wendy’s is giving away free limited-edition Canon PowerShot G7 X Mark III digital cameras today featuring a red design inspired by its menu. [Read More]

items.title: Photographer Cleans Up Hundreds of Plastic Rose Petals Left Behind on Beach
items.summary: A photographer cleaned up another couple's mess after arriving at a beach only to find it covered in plastic rose petals. [Read More]

items.title: Director Martin Scorsese Joins AI Image Startup Black Forest Labs
items.summary: Martin Scorsese has joined the AI image company Black Forest Labs as an adviser, a decision that has shocked some in the film and creative communities. [Read More]

items.title: Eddie AI Feedback Mode v2 Released – Timestamped Edit Notes for More Video Types
items.summary: Eddie AI has announced Feedback Mode v2, an update to its AI review tool for editors, filmmakers, producers, and post-production teams. The new version lets users give Eddie more context before it res…
